You dodge backwards, evading the vine!

The tentacle slaps against your [pc.foot], winding around your body before you can react! In the blink of an eye, you’re wrapped up in tentacles that squeeze and squirm all around you, making movement all but impossible!

The vine shudders and grows thicker for a brief moment before squirming out of her mouth, squirting aftershots of purple cum onto its mother’s tits and belly. She moans, eyes fluttering closed. And with it comes thick, fragrant seed!
